results.title: Rugby-Hurricanes' Laidlaw sets sights on Super Rugby playoffs after sealing top spot
results.description: May 24 (Reuters) - Wellington Hurricanes coach ⁠Clark Laidlaw will look to manage the exertions of his players over the ⁠remainder of the Super Rugby Pacific regular season after securing top spot in ‌the standings and home-field advantage in the playoffs.

results.title: Fenerbahce Criticizes EuroLeague Organization After Fan Chaos in Athens
results.description: (MENAFN) A senior Fenerbahce official strongly criticized the organization of the EuroLeague Final Four in Athens after thousands of the club–s supporters were reportedly left outside the arena ...

results.title: Torts and Crim: Knights’ power duo bet on each other, and it’s paid off
results.description: Kelly McCrimmon took a gamble hiring John Tortorella with eight games left in the regular season. The new dynamic has the Golden Knights two wins from a trip to the Stanley Cup Final.

results.title: Sheeraz explains stoppage win after landing first punch
results.description: Hamzah Sheeraz says his WBO super-middleweight title win came down to reading his opponent's response to the opening exchanges. The light middleweight walked down a negative foe after sensing early vulnerability.

results.title: George Mawuli Vormawor to officiate Kotoko vs All Blacks decider
results.description: Referee George Mawuli Vormawor has been appointed to officiate the Ghana Premier League Matchday 34 fixture between Asante Kotoko and Swedru All Blacks at the Baba Yara Sports Stadium on Sunday. The final-day encounter is expected to be one of the most crucial matches of the season, particularly for Swedru All Blacks, who are battling [...] The post George Mawuli Vormawor to officiate Kotoko vs All Blacks decider appeared first on Ghana News Online .

results.title: NFL analyst’s explosive Dianna Russini theory reignites Mike Vrabel drama as Sean McVay rumors resurface
results.description: Fresh speculation surrounding Dianna Russini has once again stirred NFL headlines after comments involving Mike Vrabel and resurfaced rumors tied to Sean McVay spread online. During a WEEI appearance, NFL analyst Mike Florio described Russini as the “wild card” in the ongoing Vrabel controversy, while Robert Littal revived an old rumor connected to McVay’s Washington days. Neither Russini nor McVay publicly addressed the viral claims, but the NFL world continues buzzing over the growing offseason drama.

results.title: Cincinnati Reds shortstop Elly De La Cruz (44) gestures as he crosses home plate after hitting a 3-run home run in the fifth inning between the St. Louis Cardinals and Cincinnati Reds at Great American Ball Park in Cincinnati on Saturday, May 23, 2026.
results.description: The Cincinnati Reds bounced back after a loss this afternoon to the Cardinals and took game two of the doubleheader 7-6 in extra innings.

results.title: Jorge Ruvalcaba records a brace as Red Bulls edge Sporting KC
results.description: Jorge Ruvalcaba scored a pair of first half goals on Saturday night to help the visiting New York Red Bulls earn a 2-1 victory over Sporting Kansas City.
